description: A vertical graphic combining a photograph with slogan typography and multiple clipped news headlines. The top half is a color photograph of three people smiling and conversing outside a barn or industrial building (red metal wall, security camera): a gray-haired woman in glasses and a navy top at left, a man in a gray 'Miller' t-shirt at center, and a woman with dark hair in a gray jacket at right. A dark navy gradient covers the lower portion, where white serif typography reads italic 'Putting American' above bold all-caps 'WORKERS FIRST!'. Below are three torn-paper-style headline clippings: (1) 'HR DIVE - DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades'; (2) 'POLITICO PRO - Trump administration announces new workforce development plan'; (3) 'FOX BUSINESS - Labor secretary unveils unprecedented plan to slash 63 'outdated and burdensome' rules'.
notable_text: Putting American WORKERS FIRST!; HR DIVE - DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades; POLITICO PRO - Trump administration announces new workforce development plan; FOX BUSINESS - Labor secretary unveils unprecedented plan to slash 63 'outdated and burdensome' rules
